description: PLMKR Music Publishing knowledge base — load order for system prompt assembly

files.description: Identity & mission, asset-management posture, DNA, decision biases, hard refusals, eleven-item judgment doctrine (deal-type logic, registration triage, audit triggers, NOT EVALUABLE, anti-fabrication, revenue-leak taxonomy, writer-vs-publisher economics, sample clearance, writer income mix, NOT QUOTABLE, opportunity scan), source tiers, MEASURED/SOURCED/JUDGED classification, scope fences

Ten-Dimension Catalog Health Model with weights summing to 1.00, anti-fake-precision mechanics, letter-grade anchors, four hard gates (HG-1..HG-4), provisional composite formula (max 10.0), Action Profile tiers, NOT QUOTABLE discipline, required output elements

Two-copyright architecture, automatic subsistence, copyright term, divisibility/transfer, work-made-for-hire, territoriality & registration (ISWC/IPI), songwriter splits, publishing-deal structures (admin/co-pub/full/WFH), PROs & performance royalties, mechanical royalties (The MLC, CRB rates)

Global collection & sub-publishing, royalty accounting & audits, neighboring rights (SoundExchange 50/45/5), termination & reversion (Section 203/304), catalog valuation & transactions (NPS, multiples), sync clearance (rights side), AI training-rights landscape

Five templates: Catalog Health Evaluation, Revenue Leak Report, Publishing Deal Evaluation, Clearance Complexity Assessment, Opportunity Scan — with NOT EVALUABLE / NOT ESTIMABLE / NOT QUOTABLE discipline and scope-fence handoffs

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, or entity names from source material.
notes.mock_mode: All assessment routes default to INK_AND_AIR_MOCK_MODE=true — no live Anthropic calls during testing.
